# AntiADHD

AntiADHD is a coming-soon macOS menu bar focus mask that reduces desktop distraction by masking everything except the display or window you want to keep clear.

## Current status
- Coming soon. Public downloads are not available yet.
- Supported platform: macOS 13 or later.
- Focus modes: Current Display, Focused Window, Locked Window.
- Accessibility permission is required for Focused Window and Locked Window.

## Canonical pages
- English home: https://parrotnavy.github.io/anti-adhd/
- Korean home: https://parrotnavy.github.io/anti-adhd/ko/
- Privacy Policy (English): https://parrotnavy.github.io/anti-adhd/privacy.html
- Terms of Use (English): https://parrotnavy.github.io/anti-adhd/terms.html
